# SERP Secrets

> Personal blog by Filippo Danesi on SEO, AI search, AEO/GEO, and the future of search. Long-form analysis of how generative AI is reshaping organic traffic, search behavior, and content strategy.

Author: Filippo Danesi — SEO & AI Search Strategist (AEO/GEO).
Site: https://www.serp-secrets.com
Feed: https://www.serp-secrets.com/feed.xml
Sitemap: https://www.serp-secrets.com/sitemap.xml
Markdown for any post: append `.md` to the post URL (e.g. https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/the-great-decoupling.md).
Full corpus in a single file: https://www.serp-secrets.com/llms-full.txt

## Artificial Intelligence

> Exploring AI applications in SEO and content marketing.

- [Checkout Is the New Battleground](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/checkout-new-battleground/): Google and OpenAI launched competing protocols for AI-powered checkout. Here's what UCP and ACP mean for merchants, SEO, and the future of e-commerce. (~2.1K tokens)
- [Why Users Are Turning Away from AI Search](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/ai-search-backlash/): AI search is convenient but untrustworthy. This analysis explores the user backlash and the growing demand for authentic, human-generated content. (~4.4K tokens)
- [Query Fan-Out in Google AI Mode](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/query-fan-out-google-ai-mode/): Discover how Google's Query Fan-Out technology transforms single searches into parallel queries, transforming AI search with richer results. (~4.3K tokens)
- [AI in Search: Google AI Mode & Overviews](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/evolution-of-search-with-ai/): How Google AI Mode and AI Overviews reshape search, SEO tactics, user experience and strategy through 2030. (~2.3K tokens)
- [Generative vs Agentic AI: What They Are](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/generative-vs-agentic-ai/): In today's SEO landscape, Generative AI creates content, while Agentic AI automates actions. Understanding both is key to scaling without losing quality. (~5.6K tokens)
- [Why 2025 Will Be the Year of AI Agents](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/why-2025-will-be-the-year-of-ai-agents/): Discover how autonomous AI agents will transform work and business decisions in 2025, from practical applications to implementation challenges across industries. (~2.9K tokens)
- [GEO, the Future of Digital Optimization](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/geo-the-future-of-digital-optimization/): Discover how Generative Experience Optimization (GEO) is changing digital strategy by bridging SEO and AI assistants for enhanced UX and visibility. (~1.3K tokens)
- [The Future of SEO if ChatGPT Kills Search Engines](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/the-future-of-seo-if-chatgpt-kills-search-engines/): Exploring the future of SEO in an AI-dominated world, where ChatGPT challenges traditional search engines, reshaping digital marketing. (~1.8K tokens)
- [Exploring How Google LaMDA Language Model Work](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/exploring-how-google-lamda-language-model-work/): Discover how Google LaMDA works, explore its revolutionary language model for dialogue applications, and learn its impact on the future of SEO. (~1.4K tokens)
- [AI and ML, What are the Differences?](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/ai-and-ml-what-are-the-differences/): Explore the future of SEO in an AI-driven world where conversational AI like ChatGPT reshapes search, presenting new challenges and opportunities. (~828 tokens)
- [Generative AI and Predictive AI, What They Are](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/generative-ai-and-predictive-ai/): Explore the future of SEO in an AI-driven world where conversational AI like ChatGPT reshapes search, presenting new challenges and opportunities. (~867 tokens)
- [Will Artificial Intelligence Replace Humans?](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/will-artificial-intelligence-replace-humans/): Artificial intelligence will change the way we work and live, but can it really replace humans? Let's explore limits and capabilities of this technology. (~1.1K tokens)

## SEO News

> Latest updates and news from the SEO industry.

- [Google Monopolizes Searches: Why It Happens](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/google-monopolizes-searches/): Explore how Google prioritizes its own content in search results, understand the impact of AI Overviews on organic traffic, and discover strategic approaches to thrive despite these changes. (~4.7K tokens)
- [Will ChatGPT End Google's Search Dominance?](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/will-chatgpt-end-googles-search-dominance/): An analysis of ChatGPT's 4.33% search market share and its unprecedented growth, challenging Google's long-standing monopoly in just a few months. (~1.2K tokens)
- [SEO 2025: Upcoming Changes and How to Adapt](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/seo-2025-upcoming-changes-and-how-to-adapt/): Comprehensive analysis of trends for SEO 2025: AI applications, content strategy shifts, E-E-A-T importance, and technical adaptations. (~2.1K tokens)
- [In-Depth Analysis of Google's March 2024 Updates](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/in-depth-analysis-of-googles-march-2024-updates/): Google's March 2024 Core and Spam Updates significantly impacted search results. This in-depth analysis explores their implications for SEO professionals. (~2.3K tokens)
- [Future of SEO, Navigating an AI-dominated World](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/the-future-of-seo-navigating-a-world-where-chatgpt-reigns-supreme/): Explore the future of SEO in an AI-driven world where conversational AI like ChatGPT reshapes search, presenting new challenges and opportunities. (~937 tokens)
- [What is Google's Search Generative Experience?](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/what-is-googles-search-generative-experience/): How Google's Search Generative Experience (SGE), launched less than three months ago, is already redefining the way we search online. (~988 tokens)

## SEO Strategies

> Actionable SEO strategies and best practices.

- [The Great Decoupling](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/the-great-decoupling/): Impressions are up, clicks are down. Learn why AI Overviews are breaking your SEO metrics and what you can do about it. (~4.4K tokens)
- [How to Optimize Your Site for ChatGPT and AI Search Engines](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/optimize-site-for-ai-search/): AI search is changing SEO: discover 8 proven strategies to make your website visible to ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and future AI crawlers. (~2.1K tokens)
- [SEO on Reddit: Best Practice and Benefits](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/seo-on-reddit-best-practice-and-benefits/): Learn Reddit SEO best practices and how they boost visibility, authority, and AI-driven search in the digital era. (~2.2K tokens)
- [Future Scenarios of SEO Business, 2025-2030](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/future-scenarios-of-seo-business-2025-2030/): 5 SEO scenarios for 2025-2030: AI-dominated search, fragmented multi-modal, privacy-first, pay-to-play commerce, and open-source resurgence. (~2.7K tokens)
- [Keywords in SEO: Why They Still Matter](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/keywords-in-seo-why-they-still-matter/): Discover why keywords remain crucial for SEO in 2025, from semantic search to entity recognition. Learn how to implement modern keyword strategies for better rankings and conversions. (~1.6K tokens)
- [Google AI Overview: Impact on Search Results](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/google-ai-overview-impact-on-search-results/): Deep dive into Google's AI Overview feature implementation patterns, analyzing over 56,000 keywords across markets to understand its impact on search. (~2.1K tokens)
- [SEO, The Rise of Search Everywhere Optimization](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/seo-the-rise-of-search-everywhere-optimization/): Explore how Search Everywhere Optimization is transforming digital visibility beyond traditional SEO, encompassing multi-platform strategies for comprehensive online presence. (~1.4K tokens)
- [Why User-Generated Content is Key for SEO Success](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/why-user-generated-content-is-key-for-seo-success/): Discover how user-generated content drives SEO success in the AI era. Learn practical strategies to leverage UGC and build resilience against Google updates. (~1.8K tokens)
- [How to Create Helpful Content After HCU](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/how-to-create-helpful-content-after-hcu/): Discover how to adapt to Google's Helpful Content Update with actionable strategies for creating valuable content that ranks and engages your audience. (~1.5K tokens)
- [Training Search Engines: the Next Evolution of SEO](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/training-search-engines-the-next-evolution-of-seo/): Discover how AI transforms SEO: shift from optimizing to training search engines to boost your website's visibility in the AI era. (~2.5K tokens)
- [Adapting to Google's Helpful Content era](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/adapting-to-googles-helpful-content-era/): Google's 'Helpful Content' update aims to promote helpful content. Adapting can lead to better rankings and traffic. (~971 tokens)
- [SEO in 2024: Trends, Tips & Strategies Guide](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/seo-in-2024-trends-tips-strategies-guide/): Stay ahead in 2024 with key SEO insights: AI advancements, voice search growth, E-E-A-T importance, mobile-first strategies, and more in our in-depth guide. (~6.1K tokens)
- [Optimizing Content for Google Search Generative Experience](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/optimizing-content-for-google-search-generative-experience/): SEO for the New Google Search Generative Experience: Key strategies for optimizing AI-driven content creation and staying ahead in digital marketing. (~1.3K tokens)
- [How to use AI in SEO Forecasting](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/how-to-use-ai-in-seo-forecasting/): Find out how Artificial Intelligence can improve your SEO. Guide to creating an AI-powered SEO prediction tool to optimize your online ranking. (~982 tokens)
- [How to use LSI Keywords in SEO?](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/how-to-use-lsi-keywords-in-seo/): Let's discover the world of LSI Keywords, from their origin to their importance in semantic SEO. Let's see how to use them in online content. (~899 tokens)
- [Essential tools for SEO optimizing](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/essential-tools-for-seo-optimizing/): Explore the most effective SEO tools for website optimization, from Google Analytics to specialized platforms. A complete guide to boost your online presence. (~1.5K tokens)

## Technical SEO

> Technical aspects of search engine optimization.

- [Advanced Strategies for Schema Markup Optimization](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/advanced-strategies-for-schema-markup-optimization/): Unlock advanced schema markup techniques for SEO: step-by-step guide, benefits for ranking and voice search, and tips for integrating with content strategy. (~2.0K tokens)
- [Mastering BERT in SEO for Better Semantic Insight](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/mastering-bert-in-seo-for-better-semantic-insight/): In this article, we will explore the importance of BERT integration in technical SEO and discuss strategies to master this technology for improved SEO performance. (~1.7K tokens)
- [Understanding Shadow DOM for an Optimized Indexing](https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/understanding-shadow-dom-for-a-optimized-indexing/): Unlock enhanced functionality and maintainability for your website using Shadow DOM, ensuring optimized indexing and superior performance. (~1.6K tokens)

## Site pages

- [About](https://www.serp-secrets.com/about/): Background on Filippo Danesi and the editorial focus of the site.
- [Archive](https://www.serp-secrets.com/archive/): Complete chronological index of every post.
- [Categories](https://www.serp-secrets.com/categories/): Topic taxonomy with per-category indexes.
- [Contact](https://www.serp-secrets.com/contact/): How to reach the author.

## For AI agents

- Full corpus (single file with all post bodies): https://www.serp-secrets.com/llms-full.txt
- Per-post raw markdown: `https://www.serp-secrets.com/blog/<slug>.md`
- Permissions and rate guidance: https://www.serp-secrets.com/agent-permissions.json
- Repo conventions for coding agents: AGENTS.md in source repository.
